---
title: "Draft Data Science Report"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
---

## Introduction

This report examines species count data and shows the differences between the species. The purpose of the analysis is to compare the differences between the species. The data matters because it showcases the count of the species. Using this data, we can analyze the count and run the appropriate tests given our research question. 

## Data

The dataset comes from a simple CSV file included in the repository. It contains counts of different species.

## Analysis

```{r}
# Load data
data <- read.csv("../data/species_counts.csv")

# Calculate total count
total <- sum(data$count)

# Print result
total

```
Discussion

The results show differences among species, but the interpretation is unclear.
